summary_markdown: The Core Information Standard supports comprehensive healthcare workflows through systematic data capture and sharing processes.

activities.objectives: Capture comprehensive demographic and contact information for new service users, ensuring accurate identification and communication pathways are established.
activities.title: Person Registration and Demographics Capture

data_collected.notes: Informed consent or best interests decisions

activities.objectives: Develop comprehensive, person-centred care plans that reflect individual goals, preferences, and support needs while coordinating across multiple service providers.
activities.title: Care Planning and Goal Setting

activities.objectives: Ensure safe medication prescribing, administration, and monitoring through comprehensive medication histories, allergy checking, and drug interaction screening.
activities.title: Medication Management and Safety
